title: Swedish stakeholders divided on pausing wastewater treatment law [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Sweden's pharma and cosmetics sectors favour pausing the law, but other Swedish players are critical, saying EU lawmakers' credibility is at stake
summary_public: Sweden's pharma and cosmetics sectors favour pausing the law, but other Swedish players are critical, saying EU lawmakers' credibility is at stake

SE.label: negative
SE.evidence: EU lawmakers' credibility is at stake
